description_long: This is a classic wooden handcart with a rectangular flatbed platform and four large spoked wheels, reminiscent of a covered wagon design. The cart features six tall, curved wooden arches rising from the sides, likely intended to support a fabric cover, though no cover is present. The wheels are thin and metallic, attached to the sides of the cart for stability and mobility. At the front, two long wooden shafts extend outward, serving as handles for pulling or steering the cart. The load platform is constructed from wooden planks, providing a sturdy base for carrying goods. The overall appearance is rustic, with visible wood grain and a utilitarian build suitable for transporting items in an urban or rural setting.
description: A rustic wooden handcart with four large spoked wheels, tall curved arches, and long front handles, resembling a covered wagon without its fabric top.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the cart, all four wheels, the wooden arches, and the extended front handles.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the open entry, curved arches, and the two long handles extending forward.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, similar to view 0, displaying the wheels, arches, and handles from the other side.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the back of the cart, the arches, and the open platform with the wheels visible on either side.
